description_long: This motorcycle features a classic dual-sport design with a black fuel tank, seat, and engine, complemented by white fenders and gold-rimmed spoked wheels. The front is equipped with a round headlight, two rearview mirrors, and a prominent front fender, while the rear includes a red taillight, turn signals, and a visible license plate. The frame and exhaust system are finished in black, and the seat appears long and slightly contoured for comfort. The handlebars are upright and wide, typical of motocross or enduro bikes, providing good control and visibility. The tires are knobby, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. Overall, the motorcycle exudes a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic with practical features for city and light trail use.
description: A rugged, black-and-white dual-sport motorcycle with gold spoked wheels, upright handlebars, and both headlight and taillight assemblies. It features a long seat, knobby tires, and practical urban and off-road design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, upright handlebars with mirrors, and white front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black engine, long seat, gold spoked wheels, and white fenders.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red taillight, license plate, turn signals, and rear tire.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, black frame, and overall dual-sport profile.
